title: 1st Grade Math Quest
description: Fun math games for age 6! Explore addition, subtraction, and mysterious number patterns.

quests.title: Sum Safari
quests.description: Combine the items to find the total sum!

questions.prompt: What is 3 + 2?
questions.mascotHint: Count the apples! 3 red apples plus 2 more red apples make...

questions.prompt: What is 5 + 4?
questions.mascotHint: Try adding 5 balloons and 4 balloons. Tap the counters if you need help!

questions.prompt: What is 6 + 6?
questions.mascotHint: Double trouble! 6 stars and 6 stars. Count them all up!

quests.title: Subtraction Circus
quests.description: Take away items to see what remains!

questions.prompt: What is 5 - 2?
questions.mascotHint: Start with 5 cookies. Eat 2 cookies (pop them!). How many are left?

questions.prompt: What is 8 - 3?
questions.mascotHint: 8 balloons floating... pop 3 balloons! Count how many are still in the air.

questions.prompt: What is 10 - 4?
questions.mascotHint: Ten shiny diamonds, take away four. You can count the remaining bright ones!

quests.title: Pattern Forest
quests.description: Find the missing numbers in the magical paths!

questions.prompt: What number comes next in this pattern?
questions.mascotHint: We are counting up by 1 each time! 1, 2, 3...

questions.prompt: What is the missing number in the middle?
questions.mascotHint: We are skip counting by 2! Let's say it out loud: 2, 4, __, 8.

questions.prompt: Count by tens! Find the next number.
questions.mascotHint: Count with your ten fingers! 10, 20, 30...

quests.title: Greater or Less
quests.description: Compare numbers and symbols with the hungry alligator!

questions.prompt: Which number is the GREATEST?
questions.mascotHint: Twenty-five is a much bigger number than fourteen and nineteen!

questions.prompt: Which number is the SMALLEST?
questions.mascotHint: Seventeen is the smallest number here. Look at the tens place!

questions.prompt: Which alligator mouth makes this math sentence true?  15 [?] 9
questions.mascotHint: 15 is bigger than 9, so the alligator mouth points open toward 15 (＞)!

questions.prompt: Which alligator mouth makes this math sentence true?  18 [?] 24
questions.mascotHint: 24 is the bigger number here, so the mouth points open toward 24 (＜)!

quests.title: Clock Tower
quests.description: Help set the clocks to the correct time!

questions.prompt: Which clock shows exactly 3 o'clock (3:00)?
questions.mascotHint: For 3 o'clock, the short hour hand points right at 3 (🕒)!

questions.prompt: What time does this clock show: 🕕?
questions.mascotHint: The hour hand points straight down to 6, and the minute hand is up. It is 6:00!

questions.prompt: Which clock shows half past 1 (1:30)?
questions.mascotHint: Look at the hour hand! It is halfway between 1 and 2, which means it is 1:30!

quests.title: Word Adventures
quests.description: Solve the story mysteries in MathLand!

questions.prompt: Leo has 5 toy cars 🚗. He gets 4 more. How many cars does he have now?
questions.mascotHint: Leo has 5 cars, and then adds 4 more. Let's solve: 5 + 4!

questions.prompt: Mia baked 8 cupcakes 🧁. Her friends ate 3. How many cupcakes are left?
questions.mascotHint: Mia had 8 cupcakes and 3 were eaten. Pop 3 cupcakes and count what's left!

questions.prompt: There are 6 birds sitting 🐦. 4 more join them. How many birds are there now?
questions.mascotHint: 6 birds plus 4 more birds! Let's count them all together: 6 + 4.

questions.prompt: You have 9 gold stars ⭐. You give 5 away. How many stars do you keep?
questions.mascotHint: Start with 9 stars, pop 5 to give away, and count how many remain!
